reasoning: Valencia has not won La Liga since the 2003-04 season. Under the current ownership of Peter Lim, the club has experienced significant financial constraints and has often struggled in the table, finishing mid-table or fighting relegation in recent years. Meanwhile, Real Madrid and Barcelona continue to dominate the league financially and on the pitch. Even if the club were sold to wealthy owners immediately, building a title-winning squad by the 2025-26 season would be highly improbable. The true probability is likely under 1%, so I select the minimum allowed bound of 0.02.
